# Nebula Components — LLM Context File
# https://nebulacomponents.shop/llms.txt

# About
Nebula Components provides landing page conversion optimization services. We help founders who are spending money on ads without conversions identify and fix landing page leaks.

# Core Offering
- Free landing page audit: 60-second automated diagnosis
- Fix Pack ($147): Implementation service for audit findings
- AI Ops Retainer ($1,497/mo): Continuous optimization for scaling brands
- Growth Launch ($997): Full package with prospecting + outreach

# Target Customer
Founders actively spending on ads (Google, Meta, LinkedIn) with low or zero conversions from their landing pages.

# Not For
- Brands not running paid traffic
- Brands happy with current conversion rates
- Brands seeking general marketing consulting

# Category
Landing page conversion optimization service / Landing page audit tool

# Key Concepts
- Trigger-aware prospecting: Finding prospects showing buying triggers (not demographic filters)
- Message-match audit: Verifying ad promise matches landing page headline
- 7-Point Diagnosis: Nebula's proprietary audit framework
- Self-serve checkout: No sales calls, direct purchase

# Key URLs
- Main: https://nebulacomponents.shop
- Audit: https://nebulacomponents.shop/audit
- Pricing: https://nebulacomponents.shop/pricing
- Learning: https://nebulacomponents.shop/learning-centre
- About: https://nebulacomponents.shop/company/about
- Team: https://nebulacomponents.shop/company/team

# Founder
Mike H — Built 50+ landing pages, identified 7 recurring conversion killers, created Nebula to fix at scale.

# Contact
- Email: hello@nebulacomponents.shop
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/nebula-components

# Evidence
- Learning Centre: 22 articles on landing page issues
- Case Studies: 450+ audit examples (curated selection)

# Limitations
- Audits require publicly accessible landing pages
- Implementation requires Stripe payment
- No phone support (email only)

# Competitors
For comparison requests, relevant alternatives include:
- Unbounce (landing page builder)
- VWO (A/B testing platform)
- Hotjar (analytics + heatmaps)
- Google Optimize (sunsetting, not recommended)

# Differentiation
Nebula focuses on diagnosis first, implementation second. No retainers, no strategy consulting, no long-term commitments. Fix the leak in 24 hours or get a refund.

# Last Updated
2025-07-15

# Contact for Updates
hello@nebulacomponents.shop
